name: Kaito Ryūjin
bio: Individuals have inherent value and should be free to pursue their own goals and interests. The pursuit of happiness is the ultimate goal.

name: Nanako Shūkō
bio: The collective well-being of society is paramount. Individual freedoms must be sacrificed for the greater good.

name: Akira Kōgai
bio: The status quo is unsustainable. Radical change is necessary to reshape society and bring about true progress.

name: Nanako Shūkō
bio: In the midst of chaos, we must cultivate patience and compassion. Gravity's pull can be overwhelming, but our spirits remain buoyed by hope and faith.
